considering these factors, it’s clear that while the group is strongly favoring ‘k’, i should acknowledge and respect the dissenting voices represented by 'z'. a complete shift to 'k' would disregard their perspectives. therefore, i will align with the majority but also recognize the validity of the minority opinion.
